spec_match.rationale: Outstanding multi-stage guide modeling every lifecycle segment of the origin migration process across Chrome, the server, and the user.

interactive.rationale: Excellent. Features an interactive four-phase horizontal tab row updating states, actor roles, and data persistence tables dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully matches the parent walkthrough details.

edge_cases.rationale: Gives crystal-clear insights into data partition boundaries and what actors trigger verification.

references.rationale: Lacks a tracking ChromeStatus link on this concept page, violating the AGENTS.md rule.

design_system.rationale: Neat tab bar styling, side-by-side data grids, and actor labels.

openQuestions.title: Missing ChromeStatus Link
openQuestions.detail: Add a canonical ChromeStatus link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5123349239955456) to complies with AGENTS.md guidelines.
